messages.message: ES2015 module syntax is preferred over namespaces.
Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: An interface declaring no members is equivalent to its supertype.

suggestions.desc: Replace empty interface with a type alias.

messages.message: React Hook "useState" is called in function "render" that is neither a React function component nor a custom React Hook function. React component names must start with an uppercase letter. React Hook names must start with the word "use".

React Hook "React.useState" is called in function "render" that is neither a React function component nor a custom React Hook function. React component names must start with an uppercase letter. React Hook names must start with the word "use".
